false_positive_reason: Domain-specific hook names (useBenchmarkData, useCECredits, useClientTreatmentRecords, useStudioDocs, useCourse, useEnrollment, useProposals, useDeals) not in LIVE_PATTERNS list in shell-detector.mjs

failures.detail: useEducation() wraps mockContent (mockContent.ts) with no isLive guard and no DEMO label. Mock data is served to public users as if real. Violates CLAUDE.md §8 (MOCK unlabeled = FORBIDDEN).
failures.fix: Wire useEducation() to courses/education_content tables OR add DEMO banner immediately.

failures.detail: RECENT_SIGNALS is a hardcoded array displayed as real market signals. useChatSession calls mockAdvisor.generateResponse() (local mock). No DEMO label on any AI output. Violates CLAUDE.md §8 and §13 (AI safety — Generated by AI required on all outputs).
failures.fix: Add DEMO banner OR wire to real AI edge function + real market_signals query.

failures.detail: All data from static getRegionStats()/getAllCompliance() i18n lib functions. No Supabase calls, no mutations, no loading/error/empty states.
failures.fix: Build full region management WO against a regions/compliance table.

failures.detail: Uses getAdminReports() which is documented @deprecated in adminIntelligence.ts: 'All data is local; no Supabase calls. Will be wired to real queries in later waves.' No error/loading/empty states.
failures.fix: Build reports table + CRUD + export. Remove @deprecated mock.

failures.detail: Uses getBrandEducation() from adminIntelligence.ts (@deprecated mock). No DB calls, no error/loading/empty states, no mutations.
failures.fix: Wire to courses table filtered by brand_id. Kill @deprecated import.

failures.detail: Uses getBrandProtocols() from adminIntelligence.ts (@deprecated mock). No DB calls, no error/loading/empty states, no mutations.
failures.fix: Wire to canonical_protocols table filtered by brand_id. Kill @deprecated import.

failures.detail: Uses getTierPricing()/getTierFeatures() from mockTierData.ts. File header: 'All data is local mock — no Supabase or Stripe integration'. No loading/error states.
failures.fix: Wire to Stripe prices API or brand_intelligence_tiers table.

failures.detail: File comment: 'All data is mock. No Supabase mutations.' Uses getLocationSummaries() from mockLocations.ts. No loading/error/empty states.
failures.fix: Create business_locations table + CRUD. Kill mockLocations.ts.

failures.detail: Uses getApiEndpoints() from mockApiData.ts. Static array, no DB, no DEMO label.
failures.fix: Wire to api_registry table OR add DEMO label.

failures.detail: Uses getApiPricing() from mockApiData.ts. Static pricing tiers, no Stripe lookup, no DEMO label.
failures.fix: Wire to Stripe price IDs OR add DEMO label.

failures.detail: 7 pages are live (TanStack Query + Supabase) but classified as SHELL because LIVE_PATTERNS does not include their domain hook names: useBenchmarkData, useCECredits, useClientTreatmentRecords, useStudioDocs, useCourse, useEnrollment, useLessonProgress, useProposals, useDeals.
failures.fix: Extend LIVE_PATTERNS in shell-detector.mjs to include these hook names. This will reduce detected shells from 17 to 10.

notes.shell_count_clarification: Detector reports 17 shells. After manual code review: 10 are true shells (no live data or mock data without DEMO label), 7 are false positives where the detector's LIVE_PATTERNS list does not include the domain-specific hook names used.
notes.intellligence_dashboard_fixed: IntelligenceDashboard was in stale baseline as SHELL (score=1). Fresh detector run reclassified it as LIVE — uses useAdminIntelligence() which does match /useAdmin[A-Z]\w+\s*\(/. Shell count dropped from 18 to 17.
notes.demo_pages_note: 56 DEMO-classified pages are not false — they use isLive patterns correctly and show DEMO badges when DB is unavailable. These are acceptable as long as DEMO badges are user-visible.
notes.tiergated_route_pattern: TierGate is applied at route level via ModuleRoute in App.tsx. Only 1 page imports TierGate directly (IntelligenceHub). This is the intended architectural pattern — not a violation.
notes.audit_confidence: HIGH — manual code verification for all 17 detected shells, including hook source tracing for false positives
